symptoms.symptom_name: Widespread body pain of ~48h escalation on a background of chronic aching
symptoms.onset: 48 hours of escalation on chronic background

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Widespread, fluctuating pain out of proportion to joint findings is characteristic of central sensitization.
Truly polyarticular widespread pain is atypical for septic arthritis, which is usually monoarticular.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cutaneous allodynia over shoulders and hips (light touch/sheets painful)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Allodynia reflects central pain amplification — a hallmark of fibromyalgia rather than joint destruction.
Diffuse skin allodynia is not a feature of joint sepsis.
Inflammatory-pattern stiffness >1 hour supports active RA synovitis contributing to the flare.
Stiffness is reported in fibromyalgia but is less discriminating.
The fatigue–fog–widespread-pain triad is typical of fibromyalgia.
Fatigue is non-specific and also seen in active connective-tissue disease.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral symmetric MCP swelling reported by patient (puffy knuckles)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetric small-joint (MCP) swelling supports an RA synovitis component.
Bilateral symmetric involvement argues strongly against monoarticular joint sepsis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mild synovial thickening and warmth at 2nd/3rd MCP joints bilaterally, without severe erythema or effusion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective mild synovitis confirms a genuine low-grade inflammatory arthritis underlying the flare.
Mild, polyarticular, non-erythematous synovitis is not the picture of a septic joint.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse soft-tissue tenderness at classical tender-point sites (trapezius, greater trochanter)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Widespread tender-point tenderness with normal power supports centralized pain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Global muscle power normal (limited by pain only)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Preserved power with pain-limited testing is compatible with several diagnoses; true weakness is not present.

symptoms.symptom_name: No high-grade fever (37.3 C), no rigors

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of high fever/rigors lowers, but does not eliminate, the probability of joint sepsis.

symptoms.symptom_name: No new malar rash, pleuritic chest pain, or renal symptoms

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of new mucocutaneous/serositis/renal features argues against an acute severe lupus flare.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain distribution extends well beyond shoulder and pelvic girdles

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Distal and truly widespread involvement is against the girdle-limited pattern of PMR.
Immunosuppression (methotrexate) modestly raises septic-arthritis risk and lowers the threshold to exclude it.
Established RA is the substrate for the synovitis component of this flare.

loinc_ref.display: C reactive protein [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

investigation_details.expected_result: Mildly elevated consistent with low-grade synovitis; a markedly high CRP/ESR would mandate active exclusion of sepsis.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Cannot gauge inflammatory burden or safely reassure against sepsis; must be obtained via in-person pathway.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Mildly raised inflammatory markers fit a low-grade RA flare rather than a destructive crisis.
Very high inflammatory markers plus a hot joint would require urgent aspiration to exclude sepsis.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Widespread pain with allodynia, fatigue/fog and tender points, in the presence of only mild symmetric synovitis and no septic features, is the fibromyalgia-overlap gestalt — a non-destructive central pain flare superimposed on low-grade RA.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Palpation for a hot, tense, erythematous single joint is essential to exclude septic arthritis and cannot be done via chat.
Quantify inflammatory burden; markedly elevated markers change management toward urgent sepsis exclusion.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Joint aspiration and synovial fluid microscopy/culture
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Indicated only if a single joint is disproportionately hot, red and swollen — the definitive test to exclude septic arthritis.
Not indicated acutely; imaging does not diagnose centralized pain and would over-investigate a clinical diagnosis.
